name: @beamhop/acp-server
description: Server-side gateway that spawns ACP coding-agent CLIs and bridges them to browsers over WebSocket. Framework-agnostic core with thin Hono / Bun / Node / Express / standalone adapters.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/adapters/hono.ts ./src/adapters/bun.ts ./src/adapters/node.ts ./src/adapters/express.ts ./src/adapters/standalone.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --splitting --external 'ws' --external 'node-pty' --external '@zed-industries/agent-client-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external 'hono' --external 'express' && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' --external 'ws' --external 'node-pty' --external '@zed-industries/agent-client-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
